Title: Test user login with valid credentials
Preconditions: User has registered and activated the account
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the login screen
3. Enter the test user's username and password
4. Click the login button
Expected Result: The user is logged in and redirected to the home screen

Title: Test user login with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User has registered but not activated the account
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the login screen
3. Enter the test user's username and password
4. Click the login button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not logged in

Title: Test user registration with valid credentials
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the registration screen
3. Enter the test user's username and password
4. Click the register button
Expected Result: The user is registered and redirected to the login screen

Title: Test user registration with invalid credentials
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Username: testuser, Password: shortpassword (less than 6 characters)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the registration screen
3. Enter the test user's username and password
4. Click the register button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not registered

Title: Test user password recovery
Preconditions: User has forgotten their password
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the password recovery screen
3. Enter the test user's email address
4. Click the send recovery link
5. Check the email for a password recovery link
6. Click the password recovery link
7. Enter a new password and confirm it
8. Click the save button
Expected Result: The user's password is updated, and they are redirected to the login screen

Title: Test user password recovery with invalid email
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the password recovery screen
3. Enter the test user's email address
4. Click the send recovery link
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the password recovery process is not initiated

Title: Test user object creation
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Object name: Test Object, Price: 9.99, Description: Test Object Description
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the object creation screen
3. Enter the test object's name, price, and description
4. Click the create button
Expected Result: The test object is created and displayed in the user's inventory

Title: Test user object deletion
Preconditions: User is logged in and has objects in their inventory
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the user's inventory screen
3. Select the test object to delete
4. Click the delete button
Expected Result: The test object is deleted from the user's inventory

Title: Test user object update
Preconditions: User is logged in and has objects in their inventory
Test Data: Object to update: Test Object, New name: Updated Test Object, New price: 19.99, New description: Updated Test Object Description
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the user's inventory screen
3. Select the test object to update
4. Click the update button
5. Enter the new name, price, and description
6. Click the save button
Expected Result: The test object is updated with the new name, price, and description

Title: Test user object search
Preconditions: User is logged in and has objects in their inventory
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the user's inventory screen
3. Enter the search term in the search bar
4. Click the search button
Expected Result: The search returns all objects containing the search term

Title: Test user chat creation
Preconditions: Two users are logged in
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for User 1
2. Navigate to the chat screen
3. Click the new chat button
4. Select User 2 from the list of online users
5. Click the create chat button
Expected Result: A new chat is created between User 1 and User 2

Title: Test user chat message sending
Preconditions: A chat exists between two users
Test Data: User 1: testuser1, User 2: testuser2, Message: Hello!
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for User 1
2. Navigate to the chat screen
3. Select the chat with User 2
4. Enter the message in the chat input field
5. Click the send button
Expected Result: The message is sent and displayed in the chat for both users

Title: Test user chat message deletion
Preconditions: A chat exists between two users with messages
Test Data: User 1: testuser1, User 2: testuser2, Message to delete: Hello!
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for User 1
2. Navigate to the chat screen
3. Select the chat with User 2
4. Long press the message to delete
5. Click the delete button
Expected Result: The message is deleted from the chat for both users

Title: Test user job creation

3. Enter the job title and description

Title: Test user job application
Preconditions: User is logged in and a job is available

1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the job list screen
3. Select the Test Job

Test Steps:

2. Navigate to the job list screen
3. Select the Test Job
4. Click the reject button
Expected Result: The user's application for the Test Job is rejected

Title: Test user job acceptance

Test Steps:

2. Navigate to the job list screen
3. Select the Test Job
4. Click the accept button
Expected Result: The user is accepted for the Test Job

4. Click the complete button

Title: Test user job cancellation
Preconditions: A user is working on a job
Test Steps:

2. Navigate to the job list screen
3. Select the Test Job
4. Click the cancel button

Title: Test user job notification
Preconditions: A user has applied for a job and the job creator has accepted or rejected the application
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the job list screen
3. Check for notifications related to the Test Job
Expected Result: The user receives a notification about the status of their application for the Test Job

Title: Test user push notification
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Notification message: New message in chat
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Check for push notifications
Expected Result: The user receives a push notification with the specified message

Title: Test user real-time communication
Preconditions: Two users are logged in
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for User 1
2. Navigate to the chat screen
3. Select the chat with User 2
4. Enter a message in the chat input field
5. Click the send button
6. Open the application for User 2
7. Check the chat for the received message
Expected Result: The message is received and displayed in real-time for both users
